# URLScan.io

## Credentials

Reference: [https://urlscan.io/docs/api/](https://urlscan.io/docs/api/)

Procedure:

1.  Click on profile

2.  Pick `Settings API`

3.  Click on Create an API Key

4.  Copy/paste personal or premium API key
